title: Administration of successions; procedure
doc_html:
Art. 3442. Administration of successions; procedure

            Except as otherwise provided by law, all of the rules applicable to the judicial opening of a succession, its administration, and sending the heirs or legatees into possession on its termination apply to the small succession.
doc_text:
Art. 3442.  Administration of successions; procedure
Except as otherwise provided by law, all of the rules applicable to the judicial
opening of a succession, its administration, and sending the heirs or legatees into
possession on its termination apply to the small succession.
